## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Test update

## Validation

- [ ] npm run lint
- [ ] npm run build
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Screenshots or Recordings

Include for UI changes.

## Linked Issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets added
